data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #44
data.summary: [8/26(Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-ga
data.body:
[8/26(Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Grand Assault.

The following players have been banned, and their rankings have been deleted for exploiting and abusing the in-game system under our service policies.

■ Total number of players banned: 43
■ Period of Restriction: Permanent
* Removed from the leaderboard.

▶ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3114629

#BlueArhcive

![GzRPPgMagAAq80s.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/443/8tIJIgQZxsB1O36tGQg3geq71t4ipVjK.jpg)
